faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Baselios Thomas I Catholicose College of Engineering and Technology, BTC for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Baselios Thomas I Catholicose College of Engineering and Technology, BTC has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates must have passed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects and Chemistry as one of the optional subject and secured the above mentioned percentage in the subjects taken together. In case, the candidate has not studied Chemistry, the marks obtained in Computer Science shall be considered. In case, the candidate has not studied Chemistry and Computer Science, the marks obtained in Biotechnology shall be considered. In case, the candidate has not studied Chemistry, Computer Science & Biotechnology, the marks obtained in Biology shall be considered. Candidates belonging to SEBC/ PwD category will have a relaxation of 5% marks in the qualifying examination. Applicants should have completed 17 years of age as on the 31st December 2020. There is no upper age limit. Result awaited students are also eligible to apply on provisional basis.

reviews_list.review_title: I will not recommend this college to anyone.

review_content.Placements: We haven't got any placements in our college. There was a placement cell which was of no use. Our seniors and ourselves didn't have any job drives in our college. There was a drive for our juniors of 2017, which was only a drama for the companies' advertisement and it was also paid.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is also very poor. It was just a building with some classrooms. Our computer labs were fine. The other labs were not fully equipped. There were no sports and games in the college. We really liked to have some fun.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: If you have money you can enjoy here with your friends.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in this college. Till now no companies came here. No one cares about your placement and campus selection. 0 percentage of students got internship from this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is a new college but not proper infrastructure. There is no auditorium. There is no stadium. There is no hostel for students and as of now still hostel construction is going on. There is no Wi-Fi. But there are proper buildings.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty was very helpful, especially the guest lecturers who hold daily classes to help students' academic performance. The teachers were highly qualified; they held doctoral degrees. In comparison to autonomous colleges, the exams were very challenging because they were administered by VTU.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college offers good teaching, but should improve in hostel facility and placement offers.

review_content.Placements: This college doesn't offer placement. Rarely few companies visit the college. None of the companies are insteted in this college. The college is concerned only about administration and not about student life.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a hostel facility but has poor management. They haven't started providing hostels to students. It was constructed 3 years before but hasn't started yet.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our department are helpful and good. One of the faculty members is not good, and he doesn't teach anything in the class but gives high marks at the end.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, decent placements, and a supportive campus with solid CSE facilities

content.Placements: I am from the 2022–2026 B.Tech CSE batch of Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science for Women, where around 85–90 percent of students in our course are successfully placed. The highest package offered is around 12–18 LPA, with an average package of 3.5–5.5 LPA and the lowest around 2.4–3 LPA. Top recruiters for our batch included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Deloitte, IBM, Amazon, and several reputed IT companies. Nearly 60–70 percent of students also secured internships through the college or external platforms in companies such as TCS.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The faculty is good, but there is no placement.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placed in our course, the highest package of our courses, 20 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Google, Flipkart, and foreign companies. Many students got internships from our courses in big companies. Top roles offered are testing, managing, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The library available classrooms are clean and neat, and the labs we can do anything, they will teach everything. The canteen is good, and we play many games, sports, and cultural activities in our college. The faculty is good. They provide Wi-Fi and a net, and also xerox to read. The courses are very good. They are useful for the students for a bright future, and helpful, but they choose it because it's trending.

individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of placements and infrastructure. No proper skill development guidance.

content.Infrastructure: In our college, there is limited Wi-Fi connection in sufficient labs and classrooms. We also have a library where all types of books are available. No hostel facility, we usually stay outside the college hostels. We also have a medical room and a sports room. The college also conducts sports and games.

But the labs have individual rooms. It has separate labs like chemistry, physics, electrical, English, Python, C programming and there are many upcoming labs.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and they will motivate students in many ways to score a good percentage in exams. I am not sure, as it depends only on our grades and the percentage we get. Top recruiting companies for our course like Capgemini, Infosys, Wipro, and TCS. And there are many other companies for our course. Many of the students also got internships from many companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course/department are like labs, classrooms, and a library. And there is no hostel for our college, but we have a separate canteen.

faqs.question: How can I get into Jayalakshmi Institute of Technology (JIT Dharmapuri) for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Jayalakshmi Institute of Technology (JIT Dharmapuri) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.

reviews.review_text: For my course, we have separate laboratories and lots of computers. Everyone can practise on their individual system. Good Wi-Fi connection is available 24*7. reviews.review_heading: Review of Jayalakshmi Institute of Technology (JIT Dharmapuri).
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a good infrastructure with 24hrs free Wi-Fi to students for study purposes. Many books are available in the library. We also have smart classes. The quality of canteen food was not hygienic. The hospital was not available nearby in case of an emergency. College buses were not well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Due to less student we can take more responsibilities.
reviews.review_text: Poor facilities and infrastructure in B.E. Free Wi-Fi available. But mobile not allowed. For 1,2 and 3rd year students. Final year students can use for project-related purposes. Food available in canteen is low cost. But very poor quality and tasty. Home food is better choice.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jayalakshmi Institute of Technology (JIT Dharmapuri).
reviews.review_text: Our college has a speciality, but that specialities are average. Our college is in a forest area, so sometimes the monkey entered the classrooms. Labs have some instruments, but some speciality is not available in the lab.

review_summary.college_name: Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for Women Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best placements.

content.Placements: Nearly 88% percent of students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 15 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Google, TCS and Microsoft. The top roles were project manager and database administration. 70% percent of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities were good. The bedrooms were good with an attached bathroom. The water purifier and washing machines were available. The canteen food was good. The infrastructure was good. The classrooms and labs were good. The Wi-Fi facility was also available. The library was good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students are placed in our course. The average package of our course is between 6 LPA (the highest) and 4 LPA (the lowest). The top recruiting company of our course is Infosys. 80 percent of students got an internship in our course. HR roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Available systems, Wi-Fi, lab facilities, classroom facilities, and library facilities. Facilities of our hostel provide fruits, milk, and snacks, and the canteen and mess serve tasty food. They conduct a number of games and provide practice for those games.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Guidance for MBA discipline in placements scored the least.

content.Placements: BlackRock, Morgan Stanley, Accenture, and IBM were a few of the recruiters for the disciplines of MBA based on discussions by various placement offices there, and I rated 3.5 stars for placement coaching, which varied for disciplines, but for MBA it scored the least.
content.Infrastructure: The college was exclusively built for women students and supported them with lower-fee structures, others were encouraged to join the college considering the safety measures insisted for women. The transport system was enabled with all safety measures and even fitted with GPS tracking.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It's a very good facility to study in our college.

content.Placements: We got best internship and placement in our college. At least 90% students are placed in a placement. Internships are very useful for students studying in our college. There are batches which having morning shift and evening shift for the students.
content.Infrastructure: We have medical facilities near hostel. In the evening we are playing on the ground. Safety and security are a must. Well, checking out pass security, for incoming and outgoing students and parents. Foods are worth the fees. It's very tasty and healthy. On the way home, they provide a bus. Lab facilities are very useful for gaining practical experience.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good placements with great facilities.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies were TCS, Microsoft, and Google. 80% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 18 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 4 LPA. Top roles offered were software developer and data scientist. Around 70% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure was good. The college building was nice and the playground was good. Classrooms were neat and clean. The labs were good. Many books were available in the library. Wi-Fi was also available. The hostel facilities were good. The canteen was also available. Medical facilities were good.

admission_overview.college_name: Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for Women Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for Women Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for Women admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG, Advanced Masters and Doctorate levels in streams includingEngineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science, Teaching and Education and Nursing.Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for Womenadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asCBSE 12th and Tamilnadu 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.

Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 4,000 - 14,00,001for UG, PG, Advanced Masters and Doctorate level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 5 years.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Vivekanadha College of Engineering For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 6 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities were good. The bedrooms were good with an attached bathroom. The water purifier and washing machines were available. The canteen food was good. The infrastructure was good. The classrooms and labs were good. The Wi-Fi facility was also available. The library was good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Vivekanandha College of Technology For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 27 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Available systems, Wi-Fi, lab facilities, classroom facilities, and library facilities. Facilities of our hostel provide fruits, milk, and snacks, and the canteen and mess serve tasty food. They conduct a number of games and provide practice for those games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Vivekanandha College of Arts and Science For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Guidance for MBA discipline in placements scored the least.
reviews.review_text: The college was exclusively built for women students and supported them with lower-fee structures, others were encouraged to join the college considering the safety measures insisted for women. The transport system was enabled with all safety measures and even fitted with GPS tracking.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Swamy Vivekanandha College of Pharmacy, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 18 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's a very good facility to study in our college.
reviews.review_text: We have medical facilities near hostel. In the evening we are playing on the ground. Safety and security are a must. Well, checking out pass security, for incoming and outgoing students and parents. Foods are worth the fees. It's very tasty and healthy. On the way home, they provide a bus. Lab facilities are very useful for gaining practical experience.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Vivekanadha College of Engineering For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 23 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements with great facilities.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure was good. The college building was nice and the playground was good. Classrooms were neat and clean. The labs were good. Many books were available in the library. Wi-Fi was also available. The hostel facilities were good. The canteen was also available. Medical facilities were good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Vivekanandha College of Technology For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 27 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements, and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities offered in our department are labs, classroom, idea lab, technical lab, library, and research lab. The quality of the facilities in our hostel and food quality are nice. Canteen is available all the time. We have medical, sports, games, and extracurricular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Swamy Vivekanandha College of Pharmacy, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 9 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: College with well-experienced faculty members and high infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, we have 3 B.Ed plus attached batch rooms. Cloth washing service is available. Television is available for students. Gym facility is also there for students. Sports activities are there. Bus service to home on holidays, specifically for girls.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Vivekanadha College of Engineering For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 9 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Vivekanandha College of Engineering for CSE admission information.
reviews.review_text: There are multiple facilities provided by the college like a bus, a canteen, labs, classrooms, bathrooms, drinking water, etc. There is a college canteen. The food is very tasty and helpful to the body because it is very clean.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Vivekanandha College of Technology For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 7 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Placements are good. I qualified with a degree.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing. The first entry into the college is awesome. The course has facilities such as Wi-Fi on campus, well-equipped labs, and large classrooms. Hostel facilities are good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Vivekanadha College of Engineering For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 14 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for M.Tech -IT
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, and grounds. Food quality is good, the canteen is also good, medical facilities are there, and sports are held every week. And Lovely Professional University is good for all activities and good placements, and they are available to all students who need them.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Swamy Vivekanandha College of Pharmacy, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 10 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Info About Doctor of Pharmacy in SVCP
reviews.review_text: Our college is equipped with labs, classrooms, a library (both General and department), a digital library, and a computer lab with a network connection. The hospital, pharmacy, and canteen are also associated with it. We have many specialties in the hospital such as cardio, gynecology, neuro, ortho, and general medicine.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Vivekanandha College of Arts and Science For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 25 Aug 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Nice experience here; true facts about my college.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel room, they provide a table, chair, B.Ed cupboard, fan, and other items. Cleaning staff come daily to clean the rooms, washrooms, and corridors. There is a big library in the hostel. The food provided is very delicious and healthy. Guards and CCTV cameras are present in the hostel for student security. There is one big cricket ground and a jogging track. Hostel rent is affordable for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Vivekanadha College of Engineering For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 23 Aug 2024)
reviews.review_heading: This college makes my life awesome.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms are equipped with basic amenities such as a B.Ed study table, chair, wardrobe, and attached bathroom. For girls, there are either single occupancy rooms with no AC or shared rooms with 3 members per room with AC. The hostel rooms are allocated randomly. The quality of food in the mess is satisfactory, and they provide meals 4 times a day, with the menu changing every 3 days. They also provide Wi-Fi and many other useful things.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Vivekanandha College of Arts and Science For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 21 Aug 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I suggest every student to study here.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure are nice and very beautiful. In first year, there are 2 accommodation room. Rooms are very big, spacious, and comfortable for 2 students. All the basic amenities are present in the room, like table, fan, chair, beds, cupboard, etc. Hostel rooms have attached bathroom also. Mess food is tasty and delicious; they provide meals three times a day, and the menu is changed every four days. On hostel campus, there are 2 badminton court.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Vivekanandha Institute of Engineering & Technology for Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 4 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Review of the MBA course in Vivekanandha Institute of Information & Management Studies.
reviews.review_text:
Well-equipped campus with a built-up area of 50,000 sq. ft. Facilities include smart classrooms, digital libraries, an entrepreneurship development cell and industry interaction opportunities. 
The institute focuses on providing a holistic business education, especially for women students, with a dedicated MBA block and hostel.

reviews_list.review_title: It's worth taking admission here since it will give you good placements with good memories.

review_content.Placements: The placements are excellent. Specially placements for civil engineering Diploma and mechanical engineering diploma, placements are amazing. Nearby companies offer internships and placement opportunities with good amount of packages and salaries here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average but facilities like sports and libraries are amazing here. Many students get into state-level sports competitions with support from institutions. All kinds of books for all the branches are available in the library and you can issue them whenever you want.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with strict rules.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students get placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA to 10 LPA and the lowest salary package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Spark Minda, Iconic Research and Technology, Tata Motors, Bajaj Automobile, etc. Around 64% of students get internships in the electrical department at Spark Mind, Bajaj Automobiles, and Cummins India Limited. Top roles offered are supervisor and operator.
review_content.Infrastructure: Building of our college is big with a good environment as the farm is near our college. Many trees are planted around the college. All the facilities are provided in the classrooms like fans, lights, etc. Labs are neat and clean with all the equipment in good working condition. Facilities provided in the hostel are high-speed Wi-Fi, common TV, water, bathrooms, and toilets. CCTV cameras are installed in the hostel for security purposes. The quality of the mess and canteen food is very good. Some first aid boxes are available for medical facilities. Many types of sports matches are held in January like Kabbadi, Kho-Kho, and cricket.

highlights.summary:
The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for National College of Engineering (NCE Tirunelveli) admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: National College of Engineering (NCE Tirunelveli) provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Engineering, and have a fee structure of around INR 50,000 to 2,00,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with good staff members, friendly management but placements are the only problem.

review_content.Placements: Maximum 70% of the students got placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 8,500 per month. There are no top tier companies during placements. Top roles offered to the students are maintenance technician, production operator and QC technician. In our course, the highest salary package offered is 3 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA. None of the students got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Internet facilities are provided in our college so that students can search for the respective data after completing the class every day. Our college provides facilities like reverse osmosis water facilities and well-equipped computer labs. The hostel is well-maintained. Food prepared is hygienic, and the taste is also good. Sports facilities are also available in our college, like volleyball and cricket, and there is a good auditorium.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is okay compared to the other surrounding colleges.

review_content.Placements: Not many such placements done. No multinational or top companies visited the campus. The local companies visited with the only salary of Rs. 7,000 per month. Our batch and senior batch, there are low placements offered. Our batch students got only 2 percent placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi facility provided. The labs are somewhat okay. The classrooms are neat. Fresh air surroundings in our college. There is no medical facility in our college. There are no separate periods for the sports. So no such sports achievements are done by our college. The classrooms are nice. The quality of the canteen food is worse. The hostel rooms are okay.

review_summary.college_name: National College of Engineering (NCE Tirunelveli) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: National College of Engineering is really best college.

content.Placements: The National College of Engineering is a more reputed placement college. This college brought more reputed companies like Tata Motors, Yamaha, and HCL for this college campus interview. Every year, more than 97 percent of students get good jobs. The salary package is 2–7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure and campus environment were very good. More mechanical-related laboratories are available at this college. Full campus-free Wi-Fi network facilities are also available. Separate hostel for both boys and girls. Messy foods taste good. Some sports grounds are also here at this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of National College of Engineering (NCE Tirunelveli).

content.Placements: Above 500 students are placed on our campus. The salary offered ranges from Rs. 20,000-30,000 per month, but it varies according to the students' mentality. Zoho is the top recruiting company in our college. CSE engineer is the top role offered to the students. In our course, the salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month. About 20 students got an internship from every course.
content.Infrastructure: Education system available here and the facilities are good. Classrooms and infrastructure are wonderful. There are more than 300 students in our hostel. Sports are well in our college, and students have got Istin trophy. Medical and canteen are poor.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with good staff members, friendly management but placements are the only problem.

content.Placements: Maximum 70% of the students got placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 8,500 per month. There are no top tier companies during placements. Top roles offered to the students are maintenance technician, production operator and QC technician. In our course, the highest salary package offered is 3 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA. None of the students got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Internet facilities are provided in our college so that students can search for the respective data after completing the class every day. Our college provides facilities like reverse osmosis water facilities and well-equipped computer labs. The hostel is well-maintained. Food prepared is hygienic, and the taste is also good. Sports facilities are also available in our college, like volleyball and cricket, and there is a good auditorium.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: Our college is okay compared to the other surrounding colleges.

content.Placements: Not many such placements done. No multinational or top companies visited the campus. The local companies visited with the only salary of Rs. 7,000 per month. Our batch and senior batch, there are low placements offered. Our batch students got only 2 percent placements.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi facility provided. The labs are somewhat okay. The classrooms are neat. Fresh air surroundings in our college. There is no medical facility in our college. There are no separate periods for the sports. So no such sports achievements are done by our college. The classrooms are nice. The quality of the canteen food is worse. The hostel rooms are okay.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017

content.Other: National College of Engineering is one of the famous colleges in Tirunelveli district that belongs to Tamil Nadu. Students are very much pleasured to join this college due to low fees and the benefits of studying in this college are due to no extra hidden charges to be asked during your Academic career. The college is good for those who really suffer from financial aids and those who have the real strategy to develop self-respect as well. Though the placement scores are below average, the students can develop a good practice routine by "Career guidance" offered by the Management. The negative part is that the college doesn't take some regular steps for cultural activities. But students can show their talents in some volunteering act such as Government volunteering services and Blood donation campaign. Finally, I can say National College of Engineering can make a normal person's career into a magical one.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college has well-equipped libraries, well-advanced laboratories, and stocked libraries. The quality of our hostel is so good, and the food they provide to us is so hygienic, neat, and clean. I am really proud of my college for giving me good food. Sometimes it is not tasty, but it is always hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good infrastructure, good food quality, and good education.
reviews.review_text: Our college was well maintained with all its high-standard facilities. The hostel served Kerala cuisine, which was delicious. The library was filled with books and magazines. All the labs were well-equipped and had well-experienced staff.

reviews.review_heading: The college imparts good education to its students.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good for practical experiments. The hostel is good. Wi-Fi is also available. Library contains project and subject study material. Highly advanced machines are available in labs. Trained lab assistants. All machines available for practice of students. Word class classrooms for education and a canteen is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure. Overall, the college is fine.
reviews.review_text: An exclusive internet lab is available in the college with 6 computers with an Speed of 8mbps. Our library is fully air conditioned for the sake of us. Library has an important facility which is the Online Public Access Catalogue. E book access and E Journal access is also available.

description: P.G. College of Engineering and Technology, Nandurbar MHT CET Cutoff 2025 has been announced for B.Tech admission covering all rounds and categories for students belonging to the AI or the HS quota. For other exams, the cutoff data can be viewed in the exam-wise sections. More updates are below:

The P.G. College of Engineering and Technology, Nandurbar cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the P.G. College of Engineering and Technology, Nandurbar BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 333705 and 617092 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition w

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Data Science was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 333705 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 416409 in 2023.

P.G. College of Engineering and Technology, Nandurbar accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to P.G. College of Engineering and Technology, Nandurbar can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

P.G. College of Engineering and Technology, Nandurbar JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for P.G. College of Engineering and Technology, Nandurbar.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the All India quota. For the General category, the P.G. College of Engineering and Technology, Nandurbar B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 was 43.53, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science. Refer to the table below to see the first and last-round cutoff percentiles for various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations for General c

P.G. College of Engineering and Technology, Nandurbar MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 43.53. For the same competitive branch/course, the last round cutoff was 47.46 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at P.G. College of Engineering and Technology, Nandurbar for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Bal Krishna Institute of Technology is the best college.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of the students got placed in the previous year. The average salary package offered was of 5 LPA. Around 60% of students got internships from electrical engineering course. They provide proper practical knowledge to students. So many companies in our college allow us to get placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is well developed and with a green and clean environment. Teachers in our college are with excellent knowledge. They teach us with proper practical knowledge and clear all our doubts on time without any delay. The college has very good management. We also have a play ground and canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Bal Krishna Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide good placement opportunities. The highest salary package offered is 9 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 4 LPA - 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Around 40-50% of students got placed in our course. Around 60-70% of students got internships from our course. Our college provides good placement and internship opportunities for our course students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classroom lights are dark. Many fans not working well. Wi-Fi speed is very slow. Labs are average. The library is available 24X7 in our college. The canteen was closed due to a lack of students. Bathrooms are not clean. The basketball ground is not good.

Around 60% of students got internships from electrical engineering course. They provide proper practical knowledge to students. So many companies in our college allow us to get placement.
content.Infrastructure: The college is well developed and with a green and clean environment. Teachers in our college are with excellent knowledge. They teach us with proper practical knowledge and clear all our doubts on time without any delay. The college has very good management. We also have a play ground and canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bal Krishna Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide good placement opportunities. The highest salary package offered is 9 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 4 LPA - 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Around 40-50% of students got placed in our course. Around 60-70% of students got internships from our course. Our college provides good placement and internship opportunities for our course students.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom lights are dark. Many fans not working well. Wi-Fi speed is very slow. Labs are average. The library is available 24X7 in our college. The canteen was closed due to a lack of students. Bathrooms are not clean. The basketball ground is not good.

college_info.college_name: IITM Group of Institutions, Sonipat, Powered by Sunstone

highlights.summary: IITM Group of Institutions, Sonipat, Powered by Sunstone was founded in 2010. It is a private institute and is located in Sonepat, Haryana. IITM Group of Institutions, Sonipat, Powered by Sunstone courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. IITM Group of Institutions, Sonipat, Powered by Sunstone offers a total of 5 courses in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, BCA and BBA. These courses are offered to students across several specialisation such as Computer Science Engineering. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 2,65,000 to 4,50,000. Apart from this, the IITM Group of Institutions, Sonipat, Powered by Sunstone campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

placements.overview:
IITM Group of Institutions, Sonipat, Powered by Sunstone has released the 2025 placements information. According to the same, over 1,200 recruiters visited the campus during placements 2025 and offered jobs in over 50 industrial domains. The highest package was recorded at INR 26 LPA. On the other hand, the average package during IITM Group of Institutions, Sonipat, Powered by Sunstone placements 2025, stood at INR 4.6 LPA.

The recorded ROI was 63% higher during the 2025 recruitment cycle. The top recruiters during the 2025 placements included Coca-Cola, Zomato, Grow, Wipro, Paisabazar, Nestle, Amul, Paytm, SBI General, Axis Bank, Muthoot Finance, HDFC Life, among several others.

placement_data.title: IITM Group of Institutions, Sonipat, Powered by Sunstone Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: IITM Group of Institutions, Sonipat, Powered by Sunstone brings together the best of learning and industry practices to ensure that every student is transformed into a professional. The institute focuses on skill development through different modules that are designed by industry experts.

It trains the students for a variety of job profiles through more than 100 hours of job-focused boot camps . To ensure that the placement-centric sessions are completed successfully, the University's placement team also monitors the dynamic changes occurring globally.

Recently, the highest and average package offered during IITM Group of Institutions, Sonipat, Powered by Sunstone placements 2025 stood at INR 26 LPA and INR 4.6 LPA, respectively. More than 1,200 companies visited the campus in 2025 and provided job offers in over 50 domains . Some of the top recruiters of IITM Group of Institutions, Sonipat, Powered by Sunstone include Nestle, Amul, Paytm, SBI General, Axis Bank, Muthoot Finance, HDFC Life, Coca-Cola, Zomato, Grow, Wipro, Paisabazar, etc.

Sunstone has launched a Placement Opportunity Program. The program offers students access to over 200 assured placement opportunities , or a refund of their first-year tuition fee if placements don’t meet the commitment. The eligibility criteria for the Placement Opportunity Program (POP) are as follows:

reviews_list.review_title: We are dissatisfied with this college. So, please don't join this college.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements because this is a new college. So, it doesn't provide at least pool campus. So please do not join this college. Go to other improving college to get the quality education. If you join this college, your life completely spoils. So, choose the college carefully.
review_content.Infrastructure: The whole college is worst. It looks like kids school. The infrastructure is very bad. There is no Wi-Fi, games facilities, no quality of rooms provided. The main thing is this college don't have hostel facility. Thus you can think how the college is.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: The infrastructure of the college is good. This is a new college as our batch is the third batch that passed from the college. So according to that, placement are just average. Faculty is much better. As what they taught is clear and worth gaining. I am satisfied to join this college. Currently working in an IT company as Software Developer on Android OS.

reviews_list.review_title: Shree vidya vinayaka institute

review_content.Placements: In terms of placements, SVVIT is at the top in Karnataka. For branches like CSE, ISE & ECE the average packages go around 8-9 LPA. The highest in the 2017-2018 batch was 39.1LPA by a CSE student this is very good in comparison to last year's data because last year, the highest package offered was 27 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure. I would rate 9 for infrastructure on a scale of 1-10. The campus is WI-FI enabled. Labs are maintained clean and are equipped with sufficient instruments which are needed. The college has a huge library containing many books.

reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure of our college is the worst.

review_content.Placements: Almost 5% of the students got placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 7,000 per month. reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement in the year 2017, infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: The placements are good in our college, but the salary package they offer is very low. The number of companies coming to our college is very less. review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the building is the worst. Our college does not provide any medical facilities, and there is no Wi-Fi facility available on the campus. review_summary.college_name: Brindavan Institute Of Technology And Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Structural Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good lab facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Obviously, after doing M.Teach in any course, the opportunity rate increases. Above 60% of students are placed in MNC companies. The highest package in SE (structural engineering) is 53 LPA; the lowest package is 8 LPA. 10–16 LPA is the average package. Tata, L&T, and Adani Group recruit us.
content.Infrastructure: Regular industrial and site visits take place. Lab facilities are good. Enough tools are there. A good classroom. AC is present in the labs. Medical facilities are available in every lab and college. Mess food is good. The canteen is also present on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of its faculty members and placements.

content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 15 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Cognizant, etc. Around 100% of students got internships in companies like IBM, Verzeo, etc. SE, technical analyst, associate system engineer, etc., are the top roles offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Wi-Fi is available. Laboratory, classrooms, and library are very good. Hostel facilities are average. The food served in the mess is better. Canteen is available. Medical facilities are also average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college charges a reasonable fee.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students got placed in this course. The lowest salary package offered was 3.5 LPA. The highest salary package offered was 7 LPA. Many students received off-campus placements.The top roles offered are software engineer and analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus environment is very good. Facilities are average. The laboratory is well-equipped. The canteen facility is decent. It also provides a library, and separate library hours are provided for students.
content.Faculty: Midterms and regular semester exams are conducted in this college. This college is affiliated with JNTUA.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college is good only for Diploma students and below-average for B.Tech.

content.Placements: The packages offered are low. Some of the companies came here to offer placements. There is no top recruiting company for Diploma students. Good companies come for B.Tech students.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good lab facilities, but some things are not working properly. Hostels in our college are the worst. Most of the hostelers leave the hostel after one year. Food is bad. After experiencing the hostel, majority of students take rooms outside the college.
content.Faculty: The college must improve its faculty team. The faculty do not teach well. They do not provide good knowledge. The curriculum is not reliable. The management should recruit experienced faculty.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: A little satisfied by studying in this college.

content.Placements: This year only 60 % of students got placed in our course. The packages offered i.e the lowest is 1.5 LPA and the highest is 5.5 LPA. The top companies that visited our college for recruitment are Capgemini, IBM, TCS and some other startup companies also recruited from our course. The roles offered are only for the freshers.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available in our college for our course are Library, Classrooms and Labs for the department students. The quality of our college hostel is actually good and the food in our college canteen is quite good and sports are conducted once a week.

faqs.question: How can I get into Brindavan Institute Of Technology And Science for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Brindavan Institute Of Technology And Science has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.After 10th Dip

reviews.review_heading: The college is good only for Diploma students and below-average for B.Tech.

reviews.review_heading: The college was good during my tenure, but not now.
reviews.review_text: We have good labs. The mess is also good. The food is good compared to the other colleges in the district, and the rooms are spacious. The infrastructure of our college is good compared to the other colleges, and the facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good. Placements are now reduced, and the college is not bad.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides infrastructure and facilities like good labs, comfortable classrooms, and a good library to study with all books. Labs have good machines and good technicians.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Brindavan Institute Of Technology And Science.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the facility in our hostel is good, and the mess is average. Canteen is also provided. Sports and games are average in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is above average.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the hostel are good. There is every lab, but there is a lack of professors. The food served in the canteen is good and available at reasonable prices. In the library, there are limited, and every student will not get the same book.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend students our college is only 60% good not more than that.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is no longer available in the college for the students to use. Sports, games facilities and also medical activities are not available. However, there is a mess or canteen, but the food served here is average. I suggest students not to prefer the food served in our college canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college does not provide good placement. Faculty members are good except for the mechanical HOD.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not provide medical facilities, sports and games. Quality of food served is somewhat good. Labs are good when compared to other colleges. Machinery and labs were very good. Our college also provides bus facility.

reviews.review_heading: We have the best infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: I feel blessed to have a well-defined library and labs. We do have Wi-Fi facility in labs and library, and there are printers. We have well-cleaned and well hygienic hostels with 24 hours of security which includes doctor and cab facility for emergencies. There was a weekly menu in the hostel which contains a variety of dishes for both vegetarians as well as non-vegetarians.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, and they provided good placements in the year 2015.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Libraries are good, but nothing out of the subject can be found. There is a  peaceful environment in the library. But it is good to borrow books from out other than the library. Canteen is the worst, and very low-quality of food was served.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good, and the management members are knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: This college provides hostel facility, and there is no problem with food as I studied 4 years in that college. Our college conducts curricular activities, and college life is very good. The canteen facility is also available here. Our college has a Wi-Fi facility, medical facility, etc. So, there is no problem for new joining students. The lab equipment is very good compared to other colleges where you cannot find that much equipment.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: There are good faculty and infrastructure. Labs were fully equipped with very high-quality machines for the students. The hostel was very good. We have good sports and games in college for that we have a huge playground. Medical facilities were also there in our college.

review_summary.college_name: Behara Polytechnic College,Visakhapatnam Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I do not recommend to join this college, if you join it will surely ruin you life.

content.Placements: Nearly 80% of students got placements, but not according to the branch or the intelligence; they just got the placements with a monthly salary of 10k to 15k. Companies were using them like slaves; none of them have any experience the companies are asking them too.
content.Infrastructure: A very minimal amount of lab equipment is available with the college. This college has two branches itself, but the computer lab is only with one campus; the other campus needs to come along to the other by walk to get the lab. The library is also present with minimal books.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Very dissatisfied in the matter of fee and exam pattern.

content.Placements: Almost 70 percent of students got placements in final year. We got recruitments from many companies like Kimberly, tech Mahindra, TCS and others. In final semester, we participate in internship in the course. Overall our college is one of the top most college in placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well maintained and we can easily available stationary and mess in the college. There is grounds for volleyball and kabaddi and coco. Hostels for both male and female are available with best facilities. The hostel food is also good and tasty.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Behara Polytechnic College, Visakhapatnam.

content.Placements: Our college provides a wide range of placements to all students. Mahindra and Infosys are the top recruiting companies. The highest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The average salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, the Jio network is very good. The college provides free Wi-Fi. Classrooms are good. A library is available with several books. In the hostel, 20 students share a room.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and experienced. They are helpful during exams as well. Our course curriculum is relevant, and it makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are difficult.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Behara is the new way of categorising students and careers.

content.Placements: Placements at our college are good enough. The EEE course earned the highest percentage of placements in the previous year with strong careers. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA. The lowest salary offered is Rs.30,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities at our college are appreciable. The college offers hostel facilities. Our classrooms are cleaned daily. Our college has a large double-story library. Our lab machines are huge. Wi-Fi is available for all departments. We have a very good canteen. The quality and amount are good for students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Nice infra and good teachers.

content.Placements: A total of 35 percent of people were chosen solely from our branch, with the highest pay being Rs 2 LPA. The average payout id Rs 1.5 LPA. Their lowest pay is Rs 1 LPA. Mahindra Bajaj and Infotech are the top recruiting firms.
content.Infrastructure: College has a variety of classrooms as well as good Wi-Fi and signal labs with more equipment for more students. There is also a library for students. The hostel is well-equipped for all students, with cots and washrooms, and a strict warden who is also caring.

reviews.review_text: They don't provide hostels for boys and they only provide hostels for girls. Boys should search for a rental house in the surrounding area. They don't give students playtime. Some labs are not used because the machine got damaged.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Behara Polytechnic College, Visakhapatnam.
reviews.review_text: We have good labs covering every sector but computer science lab is poor. College washrooms are also bad, I don't prefer them. We have food since money paid. College has its own nursing block also within 3 KM govrmenent hospital. Mess food is cheap but not good in taste.
